'''tavuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yobidashi|yobidashi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yobidashi|yobidashi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tavuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tævichith|tævichith]] || [[word:tævichij|tævichij]] || [[word:tævichish|tævichish]] || [[word:tævichi|tævichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tavuvuchuth|tavuvuchuth]] || [[word:tavuvuchuj|tavuvuchuj]] || [[word:tavuvuchush|tavuvuchush]] || [[word:tavuvuchu|tavuvuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tavuchuth|tavuchuth]] || [[word:tavuchuj|tavuchuj]] || [[word:tavuchush|tavuchush]] || [[word:tavuchu|tavuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tavufchuth|tavufchuth]] || [[word:tavufchuj|tavufchuj]] || [[word:tavufchush|tavufchush]] || [[word:tavufchuf|tavufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tavuchuthu|tavuchuthu]] || [[word:tavuchuju|tavuchuju]] || [[word:tavuchushu|tavuchushu]] || [[word:tavuchuku|tavuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tavuchuth|tavuchuth]] || [[word:tavuchuj|tavuchuj]] || [[word:tavuchush|tavuchush]] || [[word:tavuchu|tavuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tavuchuthul|tavuchuthul]] || [[word:tavuchujul|tavuchujul]] || [[word:tavuchushul|tavuchushul]] || [[word:tavuchukul|tavuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tavuchuthuthu|tavuchuthuthu]] || [[word:tavuchujuju|tavuchujuju]] || [[word:tavuchushushu|tavuchushushu]] || [[word:tavuchuku|tavuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tavuchuthun|tavuchuthun]] || [[word:tavuchujun|tavuchujun]] || [[word:tavuchushun|tavuchushun]] || [[word:tavuchukun|tavuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tavuchuthuoro|tavuchuthuoro]] || [[word:tavuchujuoro|tavuchujuoro]] || [[word:tavuchushuoro|tavuchushuoro]] || [[word:tavuchukuoro|tavuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
